safeToRun: Reads local launch contracts and workflow files, then optionally writes docs/production-secret-setup files. It does not read, request, set, store, or print secret values; it does not call GitHub or Cloudflare APIs, deploy, mutate DNS, create resources, or call paid APIs.

externalCredentialHelper.notes: Optional value-safe CLI path. It reads CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID from the local environment and sends them to GitHub through stdin without printing values.

generatedSecretHelper.notes: Optional manual path. The guarded deployment workflow can generate FEED_ADMIN_TOKEN and MEDIA_ADMIN_TOKEN as masked runtime values without stored GitHub secrets.

secrets.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN

preferredScope.reason: The guarded production deploy workflow targets the GitHub production environment, so environment-scoped secrets keep launch credentials behind the same approval boundary.

secrets.setCommand: gh secret set CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN --env production --repo marcgough/herbalist
secrets.notes: Set directly in GitHub without pasting the value into chat, docs, Git, or logs.

secrets.name: KIE_API_KEY

preferredScope.reason: The guarded production deploy workflow targets the GitHub production environment, so environment-scoped secrets keep launch credentials behind the same approval boundary.

secrets.setCommand: gh secret set KIE_API_KEY --env production --repo marcgough/herbalist
secrets.notes: Optional for launch. Set directly in GitHub only when approved Seedance media generation should be enabled.

variables.name: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID

preferredScope.reason: The guarded production deploy workflow targets the GitHub production environment, so environment-scoped secrets keep launch credentials behind the same approval boundary.

variables.setCommand: gh variable set CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID --env production --repo marcgough/herbalist
variables.secretFallbackCommand: gh secret set CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID --env production --repo marcgough/herbalist
variables.notes: Prefer a GitHub production environment variable because this is an account identifier, not a secret. A secret fallback is supported for existing setups.

workflowDerivedValues.name: CLOUDFLARE_D1_DATABASE_ID
workflowDerivedValues.notes: Resolved inside the guarded production workflow and written to the runner environment; it is not required as a GitHub secret.

cloudflareRuntime.note: When the guarded GitHub production deploy workflow is used, it sets required Cloudflare runtime secrets from GitHub secrets. Direct Wrangler commands are the manual fallback path.

secrets.name: FEED_ADMIN_TOKEN
secrets.setCommand: npx wrangler secret put FEED_ADMIN_TOKEN --config wrangler.news.toml
setCommands: npx wrangler secret put FEED_ADMIN_TOKEN --config wrangler.news.toml
npx wrangler pages secret put FEED_ADMIN_TOKEN --project-name herbalisti
secrets.notes: Protects manual news refresh triggers for both the scheduled Worker and the Pages feed-refresh endpoint. The guarded GitHub deploy workflow can generate this runtime token without requiring a stored GitHub secret.

secrets.name: KIE_API_KEY
secrets.setCommand: npx wrangler pages secret put KIE_API_KEY --project-name herbalisti
setCommands: npx wrangler pages secret put KIE_API_KEY --project-name herbalisti
secrets.notes: Optional until reviewed Seedance video generation is approved. Setting this can enable paid provider calls through protected endpoints.

secrets.name: MEDIA_ADMIN_TOKEN
secrets.setCommand: npx wrangler pages secret put MEDIA_ADMIN_TOKEN --project-name herbalisti
setCommands: npx wrangler pages secret put MEDIA_ADMIN_TOKEN --project-name herbalisti
secrets.notes: Protects optional Seedance media job create/status endpoints. The guarded GitHub deploy workflow can generate this runtime token when KIE_API_KEY is configured.

secrets.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
secrets.setCommand: npx wrangler pages secret put OPENAI_API_KEY --project-name herbalisti
setCommands: npx wrangler pages secret put OPENAI_API_KEY --project-name herbalisti
secrets.notes: Optional unless hosted herbal chat synthesis or repeatable server-side OpenAI image generation is added.

cloudflareApiTokenRequirements.note: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is a GitHub production secret name; its Cloudflare permissions are documented separately so values and permission metadata do not get mixed.

checks.detail: Production deploy workflow references required external credentials, optional Kie credentials, and generated runtime admin token names.
Production deploy workflow resolves the D1 database ID during the guarded run instead of requiring it as a GitHub secret.
Production contract records required, optional, and generated runtime secret names.
Required Cloudflare runtime secrets have command templates without values.
GitHub production readiness verifier is available for credential-name checks.
Value-safe helper is available for required externally issued GitHub production credentials.
Value-free helper is available for generated Herbalisti-owned GitHub admin tokens.
Cloudflare API token permission packet is available for CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN setup.
External action packet names the required production workflow secrets.

operatorSequence.detail: The guarded production workflow resolves the Cloudflare D1 database named herbalisti and creates it only if it is missing during the approved run.
Optional manual helper for storing Herbalisti-owned admin tokens in GitHub. The guarded production workflow can generate these as masked runtime values instead.

commands: gh secret set CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN --env production --repo marcgough/herbalist
gh variable set CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID --env production --repo marcgough/herbalist
operatorSequence.detail: Use the helper when values are already available as local environment variables; otherwise use the direct gh commands and enter values through stdin or the GitHub interface.

commands: npx wrangler secret put FEED_ADMIN_TOKEN --config wrangler.news.toml
npx wrangler pages secret put FEED_ADMIN_TOKEN --project-name herbalisti
npx wrangler pages secret put KIE_API_KEY --project-name herbalisti
npx wrangler pages secret put MEDIA_ADMIN_TOKEN --project-name herbalisti
npx wrangler pages secret put OPENAI_API_KEY --project-name herbalisti
operatorSequence.detail: Use only if not using the guarded GitHub production deploy workflow. Values must be entered interactively or piped from a local secret manager, not pasted into chat, docs, or Git.
